name: add_axum_route
avoid: do not block the async runtime
brief_template:
To add an Axum route:
1. Check src/routes/ or src/main.rs for existing Router::new() setup
2. Add handler function: async fn handler(State(db): State<Db>) -> Result<Json<T>, AppError>
3. Wire route in router with .route("/path", get(handler))
4. Add integration test using axum::test::TestClient or reqwest
5. Update OpenAPI docs if using utoipa
